final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand board for "Nända", a jewelry brand for girls.

Style/medium:
  Bright, colorful, youthful aesthetic
  Doodle icons integrated into the design
  Fun and elegant balance — expressive, personality-driven

Composition:
  Full brand board layout including all brand elements arranged together:
  — Primary logo
  — Secondary logo
  — Circular submark
  — Full color palette swatches
  — Font pairings (display + body)
  — Brand patterns

Subject:
  "Nända" jewelry brand identity system
  Target audience: girls, youthful demographic
  Brand values: fun, elegance, self-expression, personality

Scene/backdrop:
  Clean brand board presentation background

Lighting/mood:
  Vibrant, joyful, creative energy

Color palette:
  Rich, multi-color — bright and colorful, not muted or pastel-only

Materials/textures:
  Doodle-style illustrated elements and icons as decorative brand pattern motifs

Text (verbatim):
  Nända

Constraints:
  All six brand elements must be clearly visible and labeled on the board
  Logo designs should feel suitable for a jewelry brand — refined yet playful
  Doodle icons should feel hand-drawn and expressive

Avoid:
  Corporate or overly minimal aesthetic
  Dark, moody, or desaturated color schemes
  Generic serif-only luxury jewelry branding
